scripts.tauri:build:windows: node -e "if(process.platform!=='win32'){console.error('tauri:build:windows must be run on Windows (win32). Current: '+process.platform);process.exit(1)}" && tauri build --bundles msi,nsis
scripts.tauri:build:mac: node -e "if(process.platform!=='darwin'){console.error('tauri:build:mac must be run on macOS (darwin). Current: '+process.platform);process.exit(1)}" && tauri build --bundles dmg
scripts.tauri:build:linux: node -e "if(process.platform!=='linux'){console.error('tauri:build:linux must be run on Linux. Current: '+process.platform);process.exit(1)}" && tauri build --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
